en: The teacher is here.

ab: amana tu pibalakas, kabili mu’neng i puenengan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: sakalima demiad nu lipay ayza, mihibang anucila, maladay tahkal midang!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: hang i! tayza i sa’wac kita.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: sakatulu demiad nu lipay anucila, anucila namalahuk tayza mibalakas tu mali kita!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: u pilipayan anucila, madih tayza i kiwkay kaku atu ina.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: maydih mauta’ kaku, maydih tayza i tatai’an.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: saydan, adada’ ku bili aku, maydih tayza i tatai’an.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: kapah tayza mibanaw tu lima kaku haw?
en: May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: saydan, adada’ ku tangah aku, namalahuk amihibang.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: saydan anuayaw sakacacay demiad nu lipay amihibang kaku, atayza papiazih tu misaydan kaku.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Sabak?

ab: adada’ ku bili niza, i tatai’an ciniza.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Ateng?

ab: saydan, adada’ ku takulaw ni Ateng, mihibang ayza.
en: Teacher, Ateng has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Lisin come?
She has a fever.
